title: RSST/SFORR Supplementary Code and Synthetic N=347 Public Code-Execution Package

creators.name: Ertenu, Ali Nihat
creators.affiliation: Data Analyst, IT Project Manager, and Independent Researcher

description: Public synthetic N=347 code-execution package for the RSST/SFORR supplementary computational suite. The archive includes Supplementary File S1 for Stage-1 structural saturation diagnostics, Supplementary File S2 for ITEM_LEVEL_GRM-based GRM_RSST_Score derivation and reporting, and Supplementary File S3 for GRM refit-bootstrap ordering-stability diagnostics. The synthetic data are provided only for public code execution, output-structure verification, and workflow inspection. They are not the empirical N=103 caregiver dataset used in the manuscript's empirical analyses and should not be interpreted as participant-level empirical evidence, clinical evidence, or manuscript results.
